history.text: Maldives declared independence, a decisive step toward modern statehood.
Second Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Maldives.

worthSeeing.title: Overwater Bungalows:
worthSeeing.text: Iconic glass-floor bungalows above turquoise lagoons, pioneered by the Maldives.

worthSeeing.title: Marine Life:
worthSeeing.text: Manta rays, whale sharks, sea turtles, and rainbow coral gardens in crystal-clear water.

worthSeeing.title: Male:
worthSeeing.text: Compact, bustling island capital with the Grand Friday Mosque and colourful fish market.
